enum_values.name: WhenNeeded
enum_values.summary: (default) Load the first time a plug-in command used.

enum_values.name: WhenNeededIgnoreDockingBars
enum_values.summary: Load the first time a plug-in command used NOT when restoring docking control bars.

enum_values.name: WhenNeededOrOptionsDialog
enum_values.summary: When a plug-in command is used or the options dialog is shown.

enum_values.name: WhenNeededOrTabbedDockBar
enum_values.summary: When a plug-in command is used or when a tabbed dockbar is loaded.
